response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source leadership, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing financial risk/credit systems — key requirements for a CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven ability to build and maintain event-driven, scalable systems (GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture advocacy via workshops, TDD, CI/CD, and open-source contributions
concerns: No demonstrable experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance systems
Lack of evidence leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
Minimal mention of real-time inference, LLM evaluation pipelines, or model-agnostic agentic architecture design
